title: OP Leaves
body:
Hi everyone!

Welcome to another of my OP Loot datapacks! In this pack, when Leaves break/despawn, instead of a chance of dropping their correct loot (sticks/saplings/apples) it will drop OP Loot! Shears still work on the Leaves to get those Leaves! Also, it's a chance that they will drop OP Loot, and not always, just like it's not always that you will get something from the Leaves...

Leave the Pack Zipped In Your Datapack Folder! No Need To Type: /reload as this pack will auto load on it's own!
